description: QuantAds API routes + AppShell integration. QuantAds has 0 Next.js API routes, so all frontend API calls 404. Build the critical route handlers that proxy to the backend, and integrate AppShell with Sidebar for navigation between campaigns, audiences, creatives, analytics, and billing.
steps: Create apps/quantads/src/app/api/campaigns/route.ts - GET (list) and POST (create) proxying to BACKEND_URL. Pattern: const BACKEND_URL = process.env.QUANTADS_BACKEND_URL || 'http://localhost:3004'; forward Authorization header.
Create apps/quantads/src/app/api/campaigns/[id]/route.ts - GET, PUT, DELETE for individual campaigns.
Create apps/quantads/src/app/api/campaigns/[id]/status/route.ts - PUT for updating campaign status.
Create apps/quantads/src/app/api/creatives/route.ts - GET (list) and POST (create), apps/quantads/src/app/api/creatives/[id]/route.ts - GET, PUT.
Update apps/quantads/src/services/api-client.ts to change API_BASE to '' (empty string) so frontend fetches go to the Next.js proxy routes at /api/*.
Update apps/quantads/src/app/layout.tsx to include AppShell with Sidebar navigation: Dashboard, Campaigns, Audiences, Creatives, Analytics, Billing.

Create sub-pages: apps/quantads/src/app/campaigns/[id]/page.tsx (campaign detail), apps/quantads/src/app/creatives/page.tsx, apps/quantads/src/app/audiences/[id]/page.tsx, apps/quantads/src/app/billing/page.tsx - each with proper loading/error/empty states from @quant/shared-ui.
acceptance_criteria: All Next.js API route files exist and export proper handlers that proxy to QUANTADS_BACKEND_URL
apps/quantads/src/services/api-client.ts no longer references localhost:3004 directly for frontend fetches
AppShell with Sidebar renders on all QuantAds pages with working navigation
